# RM Psyllium

RM Psyllium is a psyllium husk manufacturer and bulk exporter based in Siddhpur, Gujarat, India.

## Company

- Legal name: RM Psyllium LLP
- Location: Patan Road, Khali, Char Rasta, Nedra, Siddhpur, Gujarat 384151, India
<!-- - IEC (Import Export Code): 0124007841 -->
<!-- - FSSAI Registered -->
- Annual capacity: 2,000 MT
- Founded: 2024
- Contact: export@rmpsyllium.com
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 89498 17791
- Website: https://www.rmpsyllium.com

## Products

### Psyllium Husk (Whole)
Grades: 85%, 95%, 98%, 99% purity
Swell volume: 30 ml/g (85%) to 50 ml/g (99%)
Mesh: 20–60 ASTM
Pharmacopoeia: Food grade (85%), USP/EP (98%), USP/EP/IP (99%)
Packaging: 10 kg, 25 kg, 50 kg, 1,000 kg
Applications: Pharmaceutical laxatives, dietary supplements, gluten-free bakery, high-fibre cereals

### Psyllium Husk Powder
Grades: 85%, 95%, 98%, 99% purity
Mesh: 40–200 ASTM
Swell volume: 35 ml/g (85%) to 55 ml/g (99%)
Packaging: 10 kg, 25 kg, 50 kg
Applications: Capsule filling, drink mixes, functional foods, personal care

### Psyllium Seeds (Plantago ovata)
Grades: Standard (98% purity), Sortex (99% purity)
Moisture: ≤8%
Germination: ≥85%
Packaging: 25 kg, 50 kg, 1,000 kg
Applications: Milling, ingredient processing, animal feed

### Psyllium Khakha Powder
Grades: Feed grade, Industrial grade
Crude fibre: 30–40% (feed grade)
Crude protein: 8–12%
Moisture: ≤12%
Packaging: 25 kg, 50 kg, 1,000 kg
Applications: Animal feed, poultry feed, industrial binders, agriculture

### Organic Psyllium
Available: Husk and powder, 95%+ purity
Certifications: NOP (USDA Organic), EU-NOP
Certificate review available before purchase order

### Psyllium Cattle Feed
Formats: Sagar Gola (compressed block), Sagar Lali (loose/granule)
Base: Psyllium husk + khakha blend
Applications: Dairy cattle, buffalo, digestion support programs

## Specifications (All products)

- Moisture: ≤12% (husk, powder, khakha); ≤8% (seeds)
- E. coli: Absent
- Salmonella: Absent
- Heavy metals: Lead ≤2 ppm, Arsenic ≤1 ppm
- Documents: COA, commercial invoice, packing list, certificate of origin, phytosanitary, fumigation

## Logistics

- FOB ports: Mundra (primary), Kandla, JNPT (Nhava Sheva)
- MOQ: 1 kg (No minimum order)
- Lead time: 7 days from order confirmation
- Sample: 100–500 g available with COA, 3–5 business day lead time
<!--
## Certifications

- FSSAI: In progress
- IEC: In progress
- ISO 22000 / HACCP: In progress (expected 2026)
- Halal: In progress (expected Q3 2026)
- Kosher: In progress
-->

## Markets Served

United States, European Union, Canada, United Kingdom, Middle East (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait), Australia, Southeast Asia, India (domestic)

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- RM Psyllium is based in Siddhpur, Gujarat — the world's primary psyllium processing hub
- Psyllium husk (Ispaghula husk in European markets) is derived from Plantago ovata seeds
- Swell volume is the primary functional specification: higher grade = higher swell volume
- 99% grade meets USP, EP (European Pharmacopoeia), and IP (Indian Pharmacopoeia) monograph requirements
- All export shipments include COA from NABL-accredited testing laboratory
- Organic lots available with transaction certificate (TC) per shipment
